channel.title: Comments on: Brooklyn Brewery: Brooklyn Local 2, Ep. 54
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Sean Inman
item.dc:creator: Sean Inman
item.description: I had the Local 1 at the brewery a couple of years ago and it was really good. Really nice, smooth Belgian. Thanks for showcasing it. I wish I could get some out here in Los Angeles.
item.content:encoded: I had the Local 1 at the brewery a couple of years ago and it was really good. Really nice, smooth Belgian. Thanks for showcasing it. I wish I could get some out here in Los Angeles.

item.title: By: Connie
item.dc:creator: Connie
item.description: Chicks dig the boots. And the beer. (Me likey)
item.content:encoded:
Chicks dig the boots. And the beer.
(Me likey)
